name: Security Gate — Baseline
description: Verify no secrets or security anti-patterns are introduced when writing files

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify: 1) No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or passwords. 2) No disabled security controls. 3) No sensitive data that would be logged or exposed. If the file is security-critical (auth, config, credentials), flag for careful review. If any issue found, DENY the write.
